title: ConSpan culvert — mild unsteady constant Q (mode 0 baseline)

parity_program.notes: Subcritical constant Q=1000 cfs, known stage DS 30.51 ft. Post-step culvert coupling (mode 0).

scope.notes: Arch culvert at RM 20.237; BU/BD embankment XS at 20.238 / 20.227. Low chord not exceeded at 50 yr Q.

linked_project.notes: Legacy ConSpan bundle + conspan.u02/p02 for unsteady mild case.

stream1d.notes: Fixture geometry + culvert from conspan_project_12.json; mode 0 post-step; downstream-first structure order (default 0).

reference.notes: Bootstrap reference from ConSpan 50 yr steady (Q=1000 cfs). Refresh from plan HDF via run_ras_reference.py.
